body: {"rationale":"Title is imperative and names the subsystem (work) and change. No explicit parent/deps declaration, which is the one gap.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":["Add explicit parent/deps statement (e.g., 'no deps' or named dependency bead IDs) to satisfy the parent+deps rubric criterion."],"waivers_applied":[]}
